key_events_next_24h.name: BTC $80K Psychological Resistance Test (key breakout level)
Weekend Low Liquidity Window (No Scheduled Macro Releases)
Consensus 2026 Conference Miami May 5-7 (Pre-event Sentiment Buildup)

notes: ETF 유입 강세+채널 돌파. $80K 저항 테스트 중, 강세 전환

analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$78,281 on May 3 consolidating just below $80K resistance (+1.89% 24h). Broke out of multi-month descending channel. Down ~38% from Oct 2025 ATH of $126K. Market cap ~$2.68T.
sentiment_key_signals: BTC holding above $78K for first time since February — bullish structural shift
May already logged >$600M ETF inflows; April BTC spot ETF monthly: $2.44B — strongest since Oct 2025
May 1 single-day ETF: $629.8M net (BlackRock IBIT $284.4M, Fidelity FBTC $213.4M)
Ethereum ETFs returned to inflows May 1: $101.2M net
Glassnode RHODL ratio 4.5 — 3rd highest in BTC history; prior readings at cycle bottoms preceded bull markets
Iran updated peace proposal submitted May 1 — risk-on, crude oil -5%
FOMC held rates 3.5-3.75% April 29; next meeting June 16-17
Goldman Sachs SEC filing for Bitcoin Premium Income ETF active
SEC raised IBIT option position limit to 1M contracts — institutional expansion positive
ARK Invest: BTC market cap $16T by 2030 — long-term institutional bullish
Large-cap crypto range-bound below $80K; altcoins showing selective gains
Total crypto liquidations $449.52M/24h — elevated but manageable
analysis.macro_backdrop: Weekend May 3-4: no scheduled macro releases. FOMC held 3.5-3.75% on Apr 29 — no near-term rate shock. Fed Chair Powell exits May 15; Kevin Warsh replacing — some transition uncertainty. CPI ~3.3% YoY (elevated). Next key macro: ISM Services May 5, NFP Apr data May 8, CPI/PPI ~May 12-13. Iran peace proposal is positive near-term catalyst.
analysis.regime_rationale: Bullish (0.60): BTC broke multi-month descending channel and is consolidating above $78K with record ETF inflows in May. Strong institutional demand (IBIT/FBTC daily $629.8M), rising on-chain cycle indicators (RHODL 4.5), and Iran peace deal reducing geopolitical risk all support bullish bias. Key risk: $80K psychological resistance, weekend low liquidity. Confidence capped at 0.60 pending confirmed $80K breakout.
